name: yangweijie/ui2
description: tool with helgesverre/libui anthor libui gui toolkit.

build:bridge: @php -r "(PHP_OS_FAMILY === 'Darwin') ? passthru('clang -shared -fobjc-arc bridge/webview_bridge.m vendor/kingbes/pebview/lib/macos/arm64/PebView.dylib -Wl,-rpath,\$(pwd)/vendor/kingbes/pebview/lib/macos/arm64 -framework Cocoa -o bridge/webview_bridge.dylib') : ((PHP_OS_FAMILY === 'Linux') ? passthru('gcc -shared -fPIC bridge/webview_bridge_linux.c -o bridge/webview_bridge.so $(pkg-config --cflags --libs gtk+-3.0)') : passthru('gcc -shared bridge/webview_bridge_win.c -o bridge/webview_bridge.dll -luser32'));"
